data.title: Analysis: Tonight's ZKJ and KOGE flash crash may be a long-planned harvesting operation
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa’s analysis, the flash crash of ZKJ and KOGE tonight may be a long-planned harvesting operation. The three main addresses targeted the huge trading volume and liquidity of the two tokens in the background of Binance Alpha. Tonight, the dual pressure of "large withdrawal of liquidity + continuous selling" caused ZKJ and KOGE to collapse one after another, and no one was spared.
1. Address 0x1A2...2759920:28:21 and 20:33:15 withdrew 61130 KOGE (about 3.76 million US dollars) and 273017 ZKJ (about 532,000 US dollars) of bilateral liquidity in two times
20:28:58 - 20:36:57 During the period, 45470 KOGE was exchanged for ZKJ, worth 3.796 million US dollars, and the transaction volume on the KOGE chain increased significantly during the period
20:30:57 - 20:59:49 During the period, 1.573 million ZKJ were sold in batches for USDT and BNB, worth 3.052 million US dollars, with an average selling price of $1.94
At this time, both KOGE and ZKJ experienced a small step-by-step decline, but did not plummet.
2. Address 0x078...8bdE720:30:33 withdrew bilateral liquidity of 33651 KOGE (about 2.07 million US dollars) and 709203 ZKJ (about 1.38 million US dollars)
20:31:10 - 20:58:18 period, 36814 KOGE was exchanged for ZKJ, worth 2.26 million US dollars
20:35:15 - 20:37:34 period, 1 million ZKJ was sold, worth 1.948 million US dollars, with an average selling price of $1.948
The "relay-style dumping" of this address finally pushed the KOGE coin price to fall rapidly, which is the continuous large negative lines of the K-line that everyone sees.
3. Address 0x6aD...e2EBb received 772,759 ZKJ transferred from address 0x078...8bdE7 (the previous dumping address) at 20:41:55, worth $1.5 million
772,000 ZKJ were liquidated during 20:42:28 - 20:50:16
The third address mainly cooperated to further catalyze the decline of ZKJ after the KOGE price collapsed, completing the harvest of the two token LPs and holders.

data.title: Pakistan Explores Bitcoin as a Tool for Monetary Resilience
data.description: According to Odaily, Pakistan's Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb recently met with Michael Saylor, the Executive Chairman of Strategy, formerly known as MicroStrategy. The discussion focused on the potential use of Bitcoin as a tool for enhancing monetary resilience.

data.title: Pakistani Finance Minister Discusses Bitcoin’s Utility as a “Monetary Resilience Tool” with Michael Saylor
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Pakistan Finance Minister Muhammad Aurangzeb met with Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) Executive Chairman Michael Saylor to discuss how to use Bitcoin as a tool for monetary elasticity. (Bitcoin Magazine)

data.title: A crypto trader was kidnapped and beaten in France, but was later released due to insufficient account funds
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that a 26-year-old trader was kidnapped on his way back to his home in Juvisy-sur-Orge, Essonne, Île-de-France, France, from Friday to Saturday night. He was forcibly taken to a stolen Clio car by four kidnappers. According to preliminary information, the victim has 40,000 followers on TikTok and was beaten after being kidnapped. The kidnappers asked him for 50,000 euros in cryptocurrency, but after checking his account balance and finding a small amount, the kidnappers released him because they found that the victim did not have the required amount. The case has now been taken over by the organized and professional crime investigation department. (europe1)

data.title: The KOGE team has previously issued a risk warning, and the current coin price has rebounded slightly
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: KOGE team 48 Club issued a statement yesterday saying, "KOGE has been fully released from day one, without lock-up. Also, 48Club has never promised in any form not to sell treasury holdings. Just like Binance has never said it will not sell BNB. Please do your own research at your own risk." According to GMGN data, KOGE rebounded slightly to above $30, with a market value of $102 million.
Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins fluctuates greatly, so investors are advised to participate with caution.

data.title: Bitcoin 656% Cyclical Gain Highlights Deep Market Demand  – Glassnode
data.description:
The Bitcoin market continues to react negatively to rising geopolitical tensions between Israel and Iran which has induced a wave of concern in the financial markets. Notably, the premier cryptocurrency has entered a consolidation movement between $105,000 – $106,000 following slight, after prices crashed to below $103,000 on Friday. Meanwhile, prominent analytics company Glassnode has shared some valuable insight into the Bitcoin market dissecting the growth of the current bull cycle so far. Bitcoin Demand Matches Maturation Rate In an X post on June 14, Glassnode draws comparisons of Bitcoin price growth in the present market cycle to previous ones
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/news/bitcoin/bitcoin-656-cyclical-gain-highlights-deep-market-demand/

data.title: Important events next week: US retail data, Senate vote on GENIUS Act
Echo Protocol Recovers Hacked Social Media Account, Ensures User Security
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Echo Protocol announced the successful recovery of its official X account (@EchoProtocol_) this morning, following a brief hacking incident. The team has regained full control of the account, which is now operating normally. The account was compromised yesterday by unidentified individuals who posted false information and suspicious links unrelated to the project. Echo Protocol promptly activated emergency response measures and collaborated with X officials to regain control.

Echo Protocol assured that the incident only affected the social media account, with the protocol itself functioning normally. User funds and data remain secure, and no anomalies were detected in the platform's contracts. The team plans to investigate the source of the hack further and may pursue legal action if necessary. Additionally, Echo Protocol has strengthened internal account protection measures and urged community members to remain vigilant against suspicious links and unauthorized actions.

Echo Protocol is focused on advancing decentralized applications within the Bitcoin ecosystem, aiming to enhance smart contract scalability and asset interoperability for BTC.
